summary: Split-screen video campaign showing diverse athletes performing mirrored movements, emphasizing unity and resilience. Used UGC and professional footage blended together. Drove massive social engagement with #YouCantStopUs hashtag across Instagram and Twitter.

User-generated content campaign showcasing photos and videos taken by real iPhone users. Billboards, social media, and TV spots featured stunning amateur photography. Created an ongoing brand movement rather than a one-time campaign.
outcomes: 6.5B media impressions, highest brand favorability scores

summary: Annual personalized year-in-review campaign turning user listening data into shareable stories. Each user gets unique stats about their music habits presented in visually engaging formats designed for social sharing.

Long-running campaign challenging beauty standards by featuring real women of all shapes, sizes, and backgrounds. Forensic sketch artist video went viral showing women describe themselves vs how strangers see them.
outcomes: Most viral ad of all time at launch, $1.5B sales increase

campaign_name: The Man Your Man Could Smell Like
summary: Humorous campaign featuring Isaiah Mustafa in absurd scenarios, speaking directly to female viewers. Followed up with personalized video responses to social media comments in real-time, creating unprecedented brand-consumer interaction.
outcomes: 105% sales increase, 11M YouTube views in 36 hours

summary: Campaign shifting focus from properties to the human hosts behind them. Used real guest photos and stories showing authentic travel moments that only local hosts could create. Emphasized belonging over accommodation.
outcomes: 14% increase in bookings, strongest brand sentiment in 3 years

summary: Counter-intuitive Black Friday ad urging consumers not to buy unless necessary. Highlighted environmental cost of consumption. Reinforced brand values of sustainability and responsibility, paradoxically driving sales and loyalty.
outcomes: 30% revenue increase, massive earned media coverage

summary: Replaced the Coca-Cola logo on bottles with popular first names, encouraging people to find and share bottles with friends' names. Created a personal connection to a mass-market product and drove social sharing.
outcomes: 2% sales increase after decade of decline, 500K social posts

summary: Highly unconventional product reveal with polarizing angular design. The 'failed' window test became the most talked-about moment. Zero traditional advertising spend — pure earned media through controversy and innovation narrative.
outcomes: 250K pre-orders in first week, $0 ad spend

summary: Community-driven beauty brand campaign leveraging micro-influencers and real customer content. Built a brand ambassador program where everyday customers became the marketing engine. Minimal professional production, maximum authenticity.
outcomes: 70% of growth from peer referrals, 2.5M Instagram followers

summary: Celebrity meal collaborations (Travis Scott, BTS, Saweetie) turning standard menu items into cultural moments. Each collab included custom packaging, merch drops, and social media activations that drove unprecedented foot traffic.
outcomes: Travis Scott meal caused supply shortages, BTS meal launched in 50 countries

summary: Campaign repositioning IKEA from budget furniture to enabler of better everyday living. Short films, social content, and in-store experiences all focused on small moments at home that bring joy. Made functional furniture aspirational.
outcomes: 8% YoY sales growth, 45% increase in brand consideration

summary: Brand mascot Duo the owl became a chaotic, threatening, and hilarious TikTok personality. Leaned into meme culture, responded to trends in real-time, and created a parasocial relationship between users and the mascot. Zero traditional advertising feel.
outcomes: 6.5M TikTok followers, 40% increase in app downloads

summary: Deliberately weird and self-aware campaign that broke every convention of food advertising. CEO singing badly, calling out their own critics, and using packaging as a media channel. Anti-advertising that felt genuine in an era of polished content.
outcomes: Triple-digit revenue growth in US market

summary: Campaign encouraging creative play and imagination through fantastical scenarios where Lego creations come to life. Mixed real Lego builds with CGI in a vibrant, optimistic world. Extended into user challenges and building events.
outcomes: 13% revenue growth, strongest brand health metrics in company history
